SUBHAS CHANDRA BOSE" sffitrrf, $rnr ffi glns qa frtr + fr{ + fi+ ffiqBi+tqd,"2021" frorfr.nr <rft{dq* Gqcs t€) frh or T.q-nf rtl"l-.fi $lT( 3T-{f,rd srlET{ errg Tifrs{ Tf{s'qT{ (1) (2) (3) (4) qdHtrfiq €ct 35 qlq qifr + Rrg usooai Qwr wrr +r qar 3Ta{iq qifi mr etsr ffi looo fr 498 fr 502 + fra frtnt 1/1ooET Fwr qqr qr qer wr{iq rrru 34.65 qrq t ss.ss rrqr+trnr tw. €. o2to1t2o21-ftflr1 qrqri+ u*rr, Efts qrtr-fi sqr{rrt MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economics Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20n January,212l G.S.R. 37(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (d) and (e) of sub-section (2) of section 24 of the Coinage Act, 2011(11 of 20ll), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely: - 1. Short title and commencement.- (1) These rules may be called the Coinage (Issue of Coin to commemorate the occasion of l25th Birth Anniversary Year of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose) Rules, 2021. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2, Denomination of coin.- The coin of One Hundred Twenty Five Rupees denomination shall be coined at the Mint for issue under the authority of the Central Government on the occasion of "125rH BIRTH ANNIVERSARY YEAR OF NETAJI SUBHAS CHANDRA BOSE'. -- 2 of 3 -- lTr{T rl-qu-c 3(i)l qTtd 16T tlutrl-t : dNTTelTWl 3 3. Dimension and composition of coin.- The coin of the above denomination mentioned in rule 2 shall conform to the following dimensions and composition, namely: - Denomination of coin Shape and outside diameter Number of serrations Metal composition (l) (2) (3) (4) One Hundred Twenty Five Rupees Circular 44 millimeter 200 Quaternary Alloy Silver - 50 per cent Copper 40 per cent Nickel - 05 per cent Zinc - 05 per cent 4. Design.- The design of the coin shall be as specified in the First Schedule to these rules. 5. Standard weight and remedy allowed.- The standard weight of the coin of above denomination coined to comLemorate the occasion of 125'h Birth Anniversary Year of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose and the remedy allowed in making of the coin shall be as specified in the Second Schedule to these rules. First Schedule (See rule 4) (D ONE HUNDRED TWENTY FIVE RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the centre with the legend "g6ftq qqil, inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word "slTkP' in Devnagri script and on the right periphery with the word "INDIA" in inglish. It shall also bear the Rupee symbol " {'." and denominaiionil value "125" in the intemational numerals below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: This face of coin shall bear the image of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose in the centre. The inscription'ffi {IrTTrt ffii frt +f 125 ?Ti qtfr Ef in Hindi is depicted on the upper periphery of the coin and the iiscription ..t2srH BIRTH ANNIVERSARY YEAR oF NETAJI suBHAs CITANDRA BosE" in English is depicted on the lower periphery of the coin respectively. The year "2021" in international numeral shall be written below the image of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose. Second Schedule (See rule 5) [F. No. 02loll202l -Coin] SHASHANK SAKSENA, Senior Economic Adviser Denomination of corn Standard weight nq-"dy uilo*"d ln composition In standard weight (l) (2) (3) (4) One Hundred Twenty Five Rupees 35 Grams l/500th plus or minus for Silver, that is to say the Silver content may vary from 498 to 502 per 1000. l/100th plus or minus, that is to say weight could be 34.65 grams to 35.35 grams.
